markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to align on content strategy and next steps for Shaped's SEO and content marketing efforts with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic growth is the primary goal, with a focus on building visibility and demonstrating results to the board](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content strategy will target three main areas: e-commerce/retail, content companies, and B2B, with a developer-first horizontal approach](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Initial focus on 2-3 high-level topics, producing 30-100 pieces of content in the first month (mix of blog posts, glossary items, and case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Success criteria for the first month will be largely qualitative, based on content relevance and quality](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

## Topics

### Recent Marketing Performance

  - [Shaped experiencing recent success with inbound leads and site visits](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [3,000 website visits from a single Reddit post](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Demo booked from Best Buy, discovered through ChatGPT research](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Strategy and Competitors

  - [GrowthX presented a three-pronged approach to content creation](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Shaped clarified their position relative to competitors:](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Developer-first, horizontal approach (like Algolia, AWS Personalize)](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Distinct from marketing-first, e-commerce focused competitors (e.g., Bloomreach, Udify)](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on well-known use cases (Netflix, Spotify, TikTok) for content inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### Content Types and Topics

  - [Blog posts for in-depth content](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Glossary items for shorter, definition-style content to cast a wide net](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Case studies or pseudo case studies on major companies' personalization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Repurposing successful Reddit posts into organic content](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Leveraging research papers and industry data (e.g., Meta attributing $70B+ revenue to personalization)](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

### Content Production and Evaluation

  - [Goal of 30-100 pieces of content in the first month, depending on content type and depth](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Initial focus on calibrating tone, depth, and style with a few draft articles](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [First month evaluation will be qualitative, focusing on content relevance and quality](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Quantitative metrics (keywords, impressions) will be tracked but not primary success criteria initially](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)

### Analytics and Attribution

  - [Current challenges with accurate channel attribution in PostHog](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Request for GrowthX's expertise on improving tracking and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shaped to review and provide feedback on content clusters in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Shaped to share any existing research, Reddit posts, and other relevant materials](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [GrowthX to select initial topics and send drafts for review](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Shaped to evaluate drafts for tone, depth, and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content production, aiming for 30-100 pieces in the first month](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion on analytics and tracking improvements to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/LqPZpUxyofdWZLrfkxiZEKFGGBrd-243?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
